question_content: 假设你叫李华，是一名高中生。请以 "My English Learning Journey" 为题，写一篇80词左右的短文，介绍你的英语学习经历、方法和感受。
student_answer: My English learning journey started three years ago when I entered high school. At first, I found it difficult to remember new words and understand grammar rules. However, with the help of my English teacher, I began to improve my listening skills by watching English movies and practicing speaking with my classmates. I also keep a vocabulary notebook where I write down new words every day. Now, I can communicate with foreigners confidently and enjoy reading English novels. This experience has taught me that persistence and practice are the keys to language learning.
